chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-847 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 11.02.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G. Sindh. None present for the petitioner nor intimation is received. This petition is pending since 2018 without any progress. On the last date of hearing viz. 13.08.2024 following order was passed:- “None present for petitioner. There is also no intimation although the name of the counsel is appearing in the daily cause list. As an indulgence the matter is adjourned with a note of caution that if counsel fails to appear and proceed with this matter on the next date, appropriate orders which may include dismissal of the petition would be passed without providing further opportunity of hearing.” In view of the above, it reflects that the petitioner has lost interest in the proceedings and chosen to remain absent. Consequently, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
